channel.title: methods on Lisa DeBruine
channel.description: Recent content in methods on Lisa DeBruine

item.title: Composite Images
item.description: I recently responded to a tweet about a preprint about whether people can see Dark Triad traits (narcissism, Machiavellianism, and psychopathy) in facial appearance. Can you tell a Dark Triad person from the face? Apparently so (data from USA and Turkey). https://t.co/BxZUcJ9cTY pic.twitter.com/xh1pcmyB5E — David Schmitt (@PsychoSchmitt) January 27, 2020 The preprint by Alper, Bayrak, and Yilmaz used faces from the Faceaurus database (Holtzman, 2011). “Holtzman (2011) standardized the assessment scores, computed average scores of self- and peer-reports, and ranked the face images based on the resulting scores.
